hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.env','.git/','pnpm-lock.yaml','.vercel/']; sys.exit(2 if any(x in p for x in blocked) else 0)"
python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); f=open('/tmp/forge-session.log','a'); f.write(p+'\n') if p else None; f.close()"

if [ -f /tmp/forge-session.log ] && [ -f /tmp/forge-current-issue ]; then ISSUE=$(cat /tmp/forge-current-issue); gh issue comment "$ISSUE" --body "Session ended. Files modified during this session:\n\n$(sort -u /tmp/forge-session.log | sed 's/^/- /')" 2>/dev/null; fi; rm -f /tmp/forge-session.log /tmp/forge-current-issue
